collection.title: 🗃️ Your Collection
collection.empty: The summoning circle awaits your first offering...
collection.emptyLogin: Log in to see your collection.

narration.circleAwakens: The ancient circle awakens... your offering is accepted.
narration.tableA: Common creatures stir in the shadows... the lesser realm responds.
narration.tableB: The earth trembles beneath your feet... darker creatures take notice!
narration.tableC: ⚡ The rift tears open! Ancient beings from the deepest realms answer your call!
narration.tierC: A common creature answers your call from the mist...
narration.tierB: An uncommon beast emerges from the arcane depths!
narration.tierA: A rare entity manifests from the arcane rift!
narration.tierS: A legendary creature descends upon the circle!
narration.tierZ: The heavens open... An entity of immeasurable power answers your call!
narration.tierD: A lesser creature emerges dejected from the thick mist...
narration.tierE: The runes fade... Only an echo of extreme weakness remains in the circle.
narration.criticalDice: ⚡ THE DICE BURN WITH ANCIENT POWER!
narration.criticalS: Reality itself shatters... a Legendary creature descends!
narration.criticalMultiNarration: The surge of power draws two legendary entities from the void!
narration.boundToCollection: {name} has been bound to your collection.
